verdict: No artifact demonstrates systematic variation of Switching ver12 Layer 1 controls (e.g. P2P_percent vs alternate metric channel selection flags processFilesSwitching knobs) with paired outputs. Existing parameter work varies post-grid observables on locked sample tables.
Measurement-definition comparisons are documented but cited run folders are absent from results/Switching/runs in this workspace; evidence is report/table-only for those claims.

No run-backed artifact shows RMSE/correlation between two Smaps produced by re-running ver12 raw→table under systematically varied Layer 1 definitions. Stage1/1b map language concerns collapse/width correlation context and observables—not two independent formation maps.
Phi1 shape stability references in pipeline docs target canonical SVD phi1 after Smap—not structural invariance of Layer 1 formation independent of downstream.
Multiple switching_canonical runs exist with run_id separation; they repeat the same canonical recipe rather than enumerating Layer 1 parameter configurations for comparison.
